title: Exclude --layers from the common bug cli flags
body:
Other applications like podman would like to switch the the default value
for --layers.  Because we re-use this code, we just need to pop layers out
of the budflags.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@rh-atomic-bot r+
@TomSweeneyRedHat He is going to change the default of --layers on podman.

:pushpin: Commit a7686cd has been approved by `rhatdan`

:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
